summary: Completed frontend testing of Services page 3D metallic periodic table redesign. All 12 requested features working correctly: 12 metallic element cubes in 3 periods, realistic metallic gradients (Gold=golden, Copper=bronze, Silver/Chrome=silvery), 3D depth with shadows, glass containers, hover 3D tilt, click to detail panel, teal ring selection highlight, scroll animations, period labels, Pt/Au positioned correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ElementCube component uses proper 3D CSS transforms with perspective for realistic cube effect
metalGradients object has correct multi-stop linear gradients for each metal (Au=golden, Cu=bronze, Ag/Cr=silvery)
metalSpecular object adds realistic light reflection overlay per metal
3D tilt effect uses mouse position tracking with smooth cubic-bezier transition
Glass container uses backdrop-filter blur and semi-transparent white background
Period 6 (Pt, Au) correctly positioned with col-start-3 to align in columns 3-4 of grid
AnimateOnScroll with fadeUp variant triggers on scroll for each period row
Order form uses RadioGroup for multiple finishes with proper controlled state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Services page 3D metallic periodic table fully working. All 12 metals displayed in 3 periods with realistic metallic CSS gradients. ElementCube component handles 3D tilt on hover and selection state. Detail panel shows large 3D preview with order form including RadioGroup for finishes, quantity input, description, image upload.
